author: mysticryuujin
content:
A PR was proposed to go-ethereum to fix an error code in the engine API:
https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum/pull/33918

However, I'm pretty sure the error code is wrong in the spec, so I made PRs to update and fix the spec and hive tests:
https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/761
https://github.com/ethereum/hive/pull/1398

Since this is just an error code fix, I doubt it really affects any of the CLs, but sanity checks welcome.
